title: Hyperlinks in Mobile App
excerpt:
How is it that hyperlinks in the mobile apps don’t work? We have a wiki with links to logins and they do not work on the mobile app? 
Is this being considered and if so, when will it roll out?

posts.author: chris1622 (Chris)
posts.cookedHtml:
How is it that hyperlinks in the mobile apps don’t work? We have a wiki with links to logins and they do not work on the mobile app?
